message:
fix: harden core library modules with visibility controls, validation, and correctness fixes

Capability wrappers (cx/wrappers):
- Make WebContext, GrpcContext, and BackgroundContext constructors generic
  over any capability superset via SubsetOf<Caps> bounds, so callers can
  narrow directly from a full-capability Cx without manual Arc casting
- Add real integration tests exercising each wrapper's capability bounds

Combinator cleanup (combinator/quorum, combinator/timeout):
- Remove compile_error! placeholder macros `quorum!` and `try_join!` that
  could never be invoked — the functional API (Quorum::new, join2_fail_fast)
  is the canonical path and the macros were dead code

Transport visibility (transport/mod):
- Gate `mock` module and its re-exports behind `#[cfg(any(test, feature =
  "test-internals"))]` so simulated transport types don't leak into the
  public API surface of release builds

Messaging capability (messaging/capability):
- Fix pattern_covers_segments so a tail-wildcard grant ("orders.>") does
  not incorrectly cover a bare prefix subject ("orders") — the tail
  token requires at least one more segment to match
- Add routing-program test asserting the fix for distributed publish

Observability sampling (observability/mod):
- Replace truncating cast-based sampling with splitmix64 hash → uniform
  [0,1) float, fixing severe bias where sequential low keys were always
  sampled regardless of sample_rate
- Add test verifying hash-based sampling distributes low sequential keys

Buffered writer (fs/buf_writer):
- Rewrite fs::BufWriter as a thin delegation wrapper around io::BufWriter,
  eliminating duplicated flush/write/shutdown logic and a subtle waker-drop
  ordering issue in the old hand-rolled implementation

Service buffer (service/buffer):
- Fix mutex hold duration in poll_ready: drop the lock before returning
  Poll::Pending to avoid holding it across a suspend point

TLS certificate pinning (tls/types):
- Implement compute_spki_sha256 for real — parse DER via x509-parser,
  hash the SubjectPublicKeyInfo with ring SHA-256, return SpkiSha256 pin
- Add known-answer test against a static PEM certificate, invalid-DER
  rejection test, and pin-set validation round-trip test

Postgres (database/postgres):
- Simplify Option<T>::to_sql/type_oid with map_or idiom
- Suppress false-positive clippy lints in test module

Entropy (util/entropy):
- Clarify BrowserEntropy doc comments to describe what it actually does
  (thin wrapper with browser-specific source_id) rather than speculative
  wasm32 plans
- Add tests for source_id, fork identity preservation, and fill_bytes

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
